title: Senior Doctor - LV Prasad Eye Institute - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - LV Prasad Eye Institute - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
LV Prasad Eye Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute:
LV Prasad Eye Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute!
